metadata.description: Compass: strategic-programming skills with persistent architectural memory for Claude Code.

plugins.name: compass
plugins.description: Strategic-programming skills with persistent architectural memory. Adds socratic-interview, premise-check, design-archeology, tradeoff-matrix, adversarial-review, architecture-journal, session-handoff, invariant-scan, and complexity-budget — plus an .architecture/ journal that survives across sessions. Closes during-task gaps the Superpowers plugin leaves open.
